name: LF Old-Fashioned Potato Salad (Rev.)
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons sweet pickle relish or dill pickle relish
recipeInstructions:
1. In a covered steamer, steam the potatoes over boiling water until tender when pierced, about 30 to 40 minutes.
2. When cool enough to handle, peel and cut into 1/2 to 3/4 inch cubes.
3. In a large bowl, stir together the potatoes, celery, onion, vinegar, salt, and pepper.
4. Add the relish, egg whites, and mayonnaise; gently mix until combined.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt or pepper if needed.
6. Transfer to a serving bowl and sprinkle with parsley.
Tip: This salad can be prepared ahead of time and refrigerated. Taste before serving and adjust the salt, pepper, and/or vinegar as desired.
Serving size: 1 cup. 84 calories, 0.17 grams fat, 0 cholesterol, 523 mg sodium.
